name: codex-orchestrator
description: Reusable GitHub Issues runner for Codex.

scripts.orchestrator:doctor: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/v2/candidate-cli.js doctor --target "$PWD"
scripts.orchestrator:status: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/v2/candidate-cli.js status --target "$PWD"
scripts.orchestrator:daemon: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/v2/candidate-cli.js daemon --target "$PWD"
scripts.orchestrator:daemon:once: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/v2/candidate-cli.js daemon --target "$PWD" --once
scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.prepack: npm run verify:workflow --silent && npm run build --silent
